ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: An access token for GitHub.com with permission to write gists. You can create one from "Settings" in your GitHub account.
ast.target: 用于 GitHub.com 且具有编写 Gist 权限的访问令牌。你可以在 GitHub 账户的“Settings”中创建一个。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The base URL for the GitHub REST API on your GitHub Enterprise Server instance. This usually ends with `/api/v3`.
ast.target: GitHub Enterprise Server 实例上的 GitHub REST API 基础 URL。通常以 `/api/v3` 结尾。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: An access token for your GitHub Enterprise Server instance with permission to write gists. You can create one from "Settings" in your GitHub account.
ast.target: 用于你的 GitHub Enterprise Server 实例且具有编写 Gist 权限的访问令牌。你可以在 GitHub 账户的“Settings”中创建一个。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether gists should be updateable through this plugin after creation. If this is turned on, when you create a gist, you will be able to choose to update an existing gist (if one exists) or create a brand new one. To make this possible, front matter will be added to your notes to track gists that you have created. If this is turned off, a brand new gist will always be created.
ast.target: 创建后是否允许通过此插件更新 Gist。启用后，当你创建 Gist 时，可选择更新已有的 Gist（如果存在）或创建全新的 Gist。为此，将在笔记中添加 front matter 以跟踪你创建的 Gist。关闭后，将始终创建全新的 Gist。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether the front matter should be included or stripped away when a note is shared as a gist
ast.target: 将笔记共享为 Gist 时是否应保留或移除 front matter

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to update linked gists when the document is updated
ast.target: 当文档更新时是否更新已链接的 Gist

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to show a notice when a linked gist is auto-saved
ast.target: 当已链接的 Gist 自动保存时是否显示通知

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to automatically generate and include a table of contents in the shared gist. The table of contents will be inserted directly after the `Contents` or `Table of Contents` heading, if one exists.
ast.target: 是否在共享的 Gist 中自动生成并包含目录。若存在 `Contents` 或 `Table of Contents` 标题，目录将直接插入其后。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 允许在创建后更新 Gist

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在 Gist 中包含 front matter

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You need to enable 'Update gists after creation' in Settings to use this command.
ast.target: 你需要在设置中启用“创建后更新 Gist”才能使用此命令。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 已将 Gist URL 复制到剪贴板。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Share as private gist on GitHub.com
ast.target: 在 GitHub.com 上作为私有 Gist 分享

ast.name: name
ast.source: Share as public gist on GitHub.com
ast.target: 在 GitHub.com 上作为公开 Gist 分享

ast.name: name
ast.source: Share as private gist on GitHub Enterprise Server
ast.target: 在 GitHub Enterprise Server 上作为私有 Gist 分享

ast.name: name
ast.source: Share as public gist on GitHub Enterprise Server
ast.target: 在 GitHub Enterprise Server 上作为公开 Gist 分享

ast.name: text
ast.source: Set a description for your gist
ast.target: 为你的 Gist 设置描述

ast.name: text
ast.source: Hit the Return key to continue
